title: overlapping SSE tasks cause double StreamEnded and double reconnect
description: Trigger: SSE stream disconnects (sends StreamEnded) and the main loop immediately spawns a new SSE task. The old task may still be running (e.g. in subscribe_events setup) and also sends StreamEnded when it eventually exits. Condition: spawn_sse_task() clones sse_tx before the old task has exited; both tasks hold a sender to the same sse_rx. Bad behavior: sse_rx receives two StreamEnded notifications in sequence, causing two reconnect cycles back-to-back, doubling the number of concurrent SSE tasks on each disconnect event.
